name: Generate + Curate
summary: Autonomous concept → generation → gallery → human curation loop with memory learning.

name: Approval Resolution
summary: Reviewer decision → knowledge base status update + author notification + messaging threaded update.

name: Review Initiation
summary: knowledge base → reviewer email + messaging approval card.

name: SLA Escalation
summary: SLA watcher with configurable escalation policy.

name: Publish or Schedule Approved Draft
summary: Event-driven dispatcher: review_decision.approved → platform connector → confirmation.

name: Source Artifact Repurposing
summary: Per-artifact fan-out into platform-tuned drafts; voice-doc-grounded; human-approval-gated.

name: Per-Platform Voice Profile Build
summary: Build-time per-platform voice profiler from sample posts.

name: Mid-Week Anomaly Check
summary: Mid-week anomaly detector, silent on normal.

name: Weekly Performance Report
summary: Weekly WoW report with rankings, anomalies, and recommendations.

name: Code-Aware Demo Recording
summary: Codebase-grounded walkthrough plan, tiered capture (screenshots or video), human review loop, learned preferences.

name: Feature Announcement Video
summary: Script + strategy -> TTS voiceover -> cloud video composition -> reviewed output, with stage-scoped rework.

name: AI Sprite-Sheet Generation
summary: Anchor → animation set via canvas technique + normalization, game-engine ready.

name: Image → Animated Short
summary: Anchor image → animated MP4/WebM via image-AI video generator; saved to the user's configured storage target.

name: Procedural Idle Breathing
summary: 4-frame procedural idle breathing, no AI, perfect consistency.

name: Newsletter Issue Curation
summary: Scan -> score -> select -> write -> assemble -> review -> deliver.

name: Sainani-Rule Draft Edit
summary: Rule-cited diff + clean rewrite + style report; learns author voice per rule.

name: Branded Design Batch
summary: Brand kit + platform-tuned copy + multiple variations + selection-driven learning.

name: Design Export
summary: Canva export -> download links or edit-URL fallback.

name: Brand Asset Generation
summary: Per-request asset generation with brief-grounded prompts, quality loop, human review.

name: Design Brief Generation
summary: One-shot build-time brief generator; source: auto-from-codebase / user-pasted / on-demand.

name: Research Report
summary: End-to-end research report with source grounding, confidence scoring, and multi-channel delivery.

name: Trend Watch Addendum
summary: Cross-session trend synthesis; event-chained off the weekly briefing, activates after 3+ sessions.

name: Weekly AI Briefing
summary: Weekly impact-scored AI briefing with source grounding and cross-session trend awareness.

name: Congressional Disclosure Scan
summary: Weekly scan of congressional stock disclosures in user-selected sectors.

name: Sector Gem Discovery
summary: Weekly hunt for under-covered names in user-selected sectors with review-tuned thresholds.

name: Idea Harvesting
summary: Codebase/domain-grounded web idea harvesting (trending repos, HN, communities); optional messaging/KB sources. Produces triage candidates.

name: Daily Briefing
summary: Daily categorized HTML email briefing with source distribution + trending topics.

name: Source Ingestion
summary: Polling ingestion + dedup + AI summarization + importance scoring + breaking-news alerting.

name: LinkedIn Watchlist Sweep
summary: Bright Data LinkedIn sweep + per-company diff + importance scoring + rate-limited real-time alerting.

name: Weekly Watchlist Digest
summary: Weekly cross-company pattern digest with importance ranking + quiet-company callouts.

name: News Correlation
summary: Daily news cross-reference over each flagged market for contextual confidence.

name: Meeting Prep
summary: Per-attendee behavioral profile + knowledge base prep page for every new external meeting.

name: Scan & Enrich Implementation Opportunities
summary: Codebase-grounded web scan (GitHub releases, changelogs, web) for implementation opportunities; optional email enrichment. Produces triage candidates.

name: Paper Discovery
summary: Daily multi-source academic discovery with PMR summaries and cross-references.

name: Profile URLs
summary: Batch website fetching + 7-dimension classification with source-list enrichment.

name: Niche Research
summary: Research gate + 5-10 ranked topic candidates from YouTube + Apify + X.

name: Research History Digest
summary: Weekly rollup of research activity + quality trend from the session log.

name: Morning BI Digest
summary: Weekday digest of saved BI queries with direction-aware anomaly flagging and deep links.
